business_analyst_capabilities: Stakeholder Management — engaging C-suite to frontline teams to align on requirements and outcomes
Requirement Gathering — structured elicitation through interviews, workshops, and documentation
Process Mapping — as-is and to-be process documentation using industry frameworks
Root Cause Analysis — 5-Why, fishbone diagrams, data-driven problem identification
KPI Design — defining meaningful metrics aligned to business objectives and strategy
UAT Testing — designing test scripts, managing user acceptance testing cycles
SOP Documentation — creating clear standard operating procedures for data and analytics workflows
Process Improvement — identifying inefficiencies and designing optimized workflows
